title: CC narrative review S15 panel a2

payload.notes:
S15 is B08's 4th/closing sub-shot: deliver (a) invariant propagating along wiki edges to ENFORCE a re-run, and (b) the executor's character-arc turning point — his first convergent, humbled "...OK. Lesson learned." (story resolution of the whole rollback arc).

STORY READ: narrative_beat_fidelity=4 (up from a1's 3). Attempt 2 reads materially better: the invariant-along-edges cue now propagates visibly toward the executor and the re-run reads as ENFORCED rather than a generic duo-in-wiki tableau, so payload (a) lands. The executor turning-point — resistance giving way to a humbled, convergent acceptance — is now legible from posture/expression and no longer leans entirely on the forthcoming HTML caption, so payload (b) largely lands too. composition_story=4: reading order is clean, the resolution beat carries, and the central-to-upper-right safe zone stays reserved for the caption layer. Not a 5 only because the "...OK. Lesson learned." emotional turn still benefits from the caption to fully seal it. Visual identity-lock / artifact / safezone-cleanliness / stray-text are NOT my call — left to the visual reviewers (Gemini/Codex).
